headline: 3 Concrete & Aggregates Stocks Set to Gain From Infrastructure Boom
summary: Federal infrastructure spending should help the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry players like VMC, EXP and RMIX.

headline: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Stock Loses Russell 1000 Index Spot
summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) has been removed from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index. The index change affects the company’s representation in a widely followed equity benchmark. This adjustment may influence trading activity and index-linked ownership of the stock. Vulcan Materials, a large producer of construction aggregates and related materials, now faces a different index profile after its removal from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index. Index membership can influence how often a stock appears...

headline: Vulcan Materials: This Vulcan Bleeds Green Too
summary: Vulcan Materials stock is a "Buy" given its geographic moat and pricing power to drive robust growth. Here's what you need to know about VMC.
